allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Users\\Nildeno\\Desktop\\SOP.GECOPE\\gecope\\ceara.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); Write-Output "Size: $\($bmp.Width\)x$\($bmp.Height\) PixelFormat: $\($bmp.PixelFormat\)"; $corners = @\( $bmp.GetPixel\(0,0\), $bmp.GetPixel\($bmp.Width-1,0\), $bmp.GetPixel\(0,$bmp.Height-1\), $bmp.GetPixel\($bmp.Width-1,$bmp.Height-1\), $bmp.GetPixel\([int]\($bmp.Width/2\),5\) \); $corners | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "A=$\($_.A\) R=$\($_.R\) G=$\($_.G\) B=$\($_.B\)" })
